problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: If Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) is applied to types, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
